## Network Comparison: UK-Only vs. UK + Poland DC

### Cost Summary

| Metric | Scenario A (UK only) | Scenario B (UK + Poland) | Delta |
|--------|---------------------|--------------------------|-------|
| Annual opex | £2.10M | £1.85M | **-£250K/yr** |
| Avg transit time | 4.2 days | 2.8 days | **-1.4 days (33%)** |

### Payback Period

**£800K ÷ £250K/yr = 3.2 years**

The Poland DC pays for itself in **3 years and ~2.5 months** on opex savings alone.
